visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a young man with dark hair and round glasses. He is wearing a brown jacket over a light-colored shirt. The lighting is dim and moody, casting shadows on his face. He looks down and to his right with a concerned and slightly worried expression. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor or nighttime setting. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera is steady, holding a tight focus on the man's face. The audio is filled with a tense and dramatic orchestral score, creating a sense of urgency and high stakes. A low, rumbling sound, like a powerful engine or a deep, ominous rumble, builds in the background, adding to the suspense. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the man's profile as he turns his head. He continues to look down, his expression remaining serious. The background remains dark and indistinct. The "风行网" watermark is still present. The camera pulls back to a medium shot from behind the man, showing his back as he moves forward.
